name: SAL.Gen_Unbounded_Sparse_Ordered_Sets

documentation.description:
Abstract :

Unbounded sparse sets.

simple_types.name: Constant_Reference_Type
simple_types.code:
type Constant_Reference_Type (Element : not null access constant Index_Type) is private with
  Implicit_Dereference => Element;

tagged_types.name: Iterator
tagged_types.code: type Iterator (<>) is new Iterators.Forward_Iterator with private;

tagged_types.name: Set
tagged_types.code:
type Set is tagged private
with
  Constant_Indexing => Constant_Ref,
  Default_Iterator  => Iterate,
  Iterator_Element  => Index_Type;

documentation.description:
We'd like to have Constant_Indexing return a Boolean, so we could
use 'if Set (Item) then'. But then the default iterator would
always return True, instead of Index_Type; we can't specify a
different Constant_Indexing function for the default iterator.

subprograms.name: Constant_Ref
subprograms.code:
function Constant_Ref
  (Container : aliased in Set;
   Position  :         in Cursor)
  return Constant_Reference_Type

subprograms.name: Contains
subprograms.code: function Contains (Set : in Pkg.Set; Item : in Index_Type) return Boolean

subprograms.name: Count
subprograms.code: function Count (Set : in Pkg.Set) return Ada.Containers.Count_Type

subprograms.name: Delete
subprograms.code: procedure Delete (Set : in out Pkg.Set; Item : in Index_Type)

documentation.description: Invalid while an iterator is active; not enforced.

subprograms.name: Element
subprograms.code: function Element (Position : in Cursor) return Index_Type

subprograms.name: First
subprograms.code: function First (Iterator : in Pkg.Iterator) return Cursor

subprograms.name: Has_Element
subprograms.code: function Has_Element (Position : in Cursor) return Boolean

subprograms.name: Insert
subprograms.code: procedure Insert (Set : in out Pkg.Set; Item : in Index_Type)

subprograms.name: Iterate
subprograms.code: function Iterate (Container : aliased in Set'Class) return Iterator

documentation.description: Returns Index_Type of elements that were inserted.

subprograms.name: Next
subprograms.code: function Next (Iterator : in Pkg.Iterator; Position : in Cursor) return Cursor

generic_instantiations.name: Iterators
generic_instantiations.code: package Iterators is new Ada.Iterator_Interfaces (Cursor, Has_Element);

formals.name: Index_Compare
formals.code: function Index_Compare (Left, Right : in Index_Type) return Compare_Result

documentation.description:
Index_Type must have a valid default initialization; it is used as
Gen_Unbounded_Definite_Red_Black_Trees.Element_Type.
